sentences.target: Ton talent me surprend chaque jour.

translations.fr: Ton talent me surprend chaque jour.
translations.en: Your talent surprises me every day.
translations.es: Tu talento me sorprende cada día.
translations.de: Dein Talent überrascht mich jeden Tag.
translations.it: Il tuo talento mi sorprende ogni giorno.
translations.ko: 네 재능은 매일 나를 놀라게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的才华每天都让我惊讶。
translations.yue: 你嘅天分每日都令我驚喜。
translations.ru: Твой талант удивляет меня каждый день.
translations.pt: Seu talento me surpreende todos os dias.
translations.he: הכישרון שלך מפתיע אותי כל יום.
translations.vi: Tài năng của bạn khiến tôi ngạc nhiên mỗi ngày.
translations.nl: Jouw talent verbaast me elke dag.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी प्रतिभा मुझे हर दिन चकित करती है.
translations.pl: Twój talent zaskakuje mnie każdego dnia.
translations.el: Το ταλέντο σου με εκπλήσσει κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Talentet ditt overrasker meg hver dag.
translations.sv: Din talang överraskar mig varje dag.
translations.ro: Talentul tău mă surprinde în fiecare zi.
translations.cs: Tvůj talent mě každý den překvapuje.
translations.da: Dit talent overrasker mig hver dag.
translations.ja: あなたの才能は毎日私を驚かせます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), agreeing with the masculine singular noun 'talent' and modifying the subject NP.
Masculine singular common noun; head of the subject phrase 'Ton talent'.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person singular), functioning as the direct object of 'surprend'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), taking 'Ton talent' as subject and 'me' as direct object.
Determiner selecting the count noun 'jour' to form a frequency phrase.
Masculine singular noun; complement of 'chaque', forming an adverbial expression of frequency ('chaque jour').

sentences.target: Elle a découvert son talent en dessin.
sentences.reading: /ɛl a dekuvɛʁ sɔ̃ ta.lɑ̃ ɑ̃ desɛ̃/

translations.fr: Elle a découvert son talent en dessin.
translations.ipa: /ɛl a dekuvɛʁ sɔ̃ ta.lɑ̃ ɑ̃ desɛ̃/
translations.en: She discovered her talent in drawing.
translations.es: Ella descubrió su talento para el dibujo.
translations.de: Sie hat ihr Talent fürs Zeichnen entdeckt.
translations.it: Ha scoperto il suo talento nel disegno.
translations.zh-Hans: 她发现了自己在绘画方面的天赋。
translations.yue: 佢發現自己喺繪畫方面嘅天分。
translations.ru: Она обнаружила свой талант к рисованию.
translations.pt: Ela descobriu seu talento para o desenho.
translations.he: היא גילתה את הכישרון שלה בציור.
translations.vi: Cô ấy phát hiện ra tài năng vẽ của mình.
translations.nl: Ze ontdekte haar talent voor tekenen.
translations.uk: Вона відкрила свій талант до малювання.
translations.hi: उसने चित्र बनाने की अपनी प्रतिभा खोजी.
translations.pl: Ona odkryła swój talent do rysowania.
translations.el: Ανακάλυψε το ταλέντο της στο σχέδιο.
translations.nb: Hun oppdaget talentet sitt for tegning.
translations.sv: Hon upptäckte sin talang för teckning.
translations.ro: Ea și-a descoperit talentul la desen.
translations.da: Hun opdagede sit talent for tegning.
translations.ja: 彼女は絵の才能を見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person singular feminine); subject of the clause.
Auxiliary 'avoir' in present indicative (3rd person singular), forming the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the main verb; head of the verb phrase, taking 'son talent' as its direct object.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agreeing with masculine singular 'talent' and modifying it.
Masculine singular noun; direct object of 'découvert'.
Preposition introducing the manner/domain phrase 'en dessin'.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'en', specifying the field ('in drawing').

sentences.target: On doit encourager son talent à l'école.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa ɑ̃kuʁaʒe sɔ̃ ta.lɑ̃ a lekɔl/

translations.fr: On doit encourager son talent à l'école.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa ɑ̃kuʁaʒe sɔ̃ ta.lɑ̃ a lekɔl/
translations.en: We should encourage their talent at school.
translations.es: Debemos fomentar su talento en la escuela.
translations.de: Wir sollten ihr Talent in der Schule fördern.
translations.it: Dovremmo incoraggiare il suo talento a scuola.
translations.ko: 우리는 학교에서 그 재능을 격려해야 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们应该在学校鼓励他的才华。
translations.yue: 我哋應該喺學校鼓勵佢嘅天分。
translations.ru: Нам следует поощрять его талант в школе.
translations.pt: Devemos incentivar o seu talento na escola.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לעודד את הכישרון שלו בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên khuyến khích tài năng của em ấy ở trường.
translations.ar: علينا أن نشجع موهبته في المدرسة.
translations.nl: We moeten zijn talent op school aanmoedigen.
translations.uk: Нам слід заохочувати його талант у школі.
translations.hu: Az iskolában ösztönöznünk kell a tehetségét.
translations.hi: हमें स्कूल में उसकी प्रतिभा को प्रोत्साहित करना चाहिए.
translations.pl: Powinniśmy wspierać jego talent w szkole.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ενθαρρύνουμε το ταλέντο του στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: Vi bør oppmuntre talentet hans på skolen.
translations.id: Kita harus mendorong bakatnya di sekolah.
translations.sv: Vi bör uppmuntra hans talang i skolan.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să încurajăm talentul lui la școală.
translations.cs: Měli bychom podporovat jeho talent ve škole.
translations.da: Vi bør opmuntre hans talent i skolen.
translations.fi: Meidän pitäisi kannustaa hänen lahjakkuuttaan koulussa.
translations.ja: 学校で彼の才能を伸ばすべきだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; generic 'one/we' (syntactically 3rd person singular).
Modal verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); expresses necessity and selects the infinitive 'encourager'.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'doit'; transitive, taking 'son talent' as its object.
Possessive determiner modifying 'talent' (masculine singular).
Masculine singular noun; direct object of 'encourager'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial 'école'; determiner of the noun.
Feminine singular noun; object of the preposition 'à', forming a location complement.

sentences.target: Je manque de talent pour chanter.

translations.fr: Je manque de talent pour chanter.
translations.it: Mi manca il talento per cantare.
translations.ru: У меня нет таланта к пению.
translations.vi: Tôi thiếu tài năng để hát.
translations.nl: Ik heb geen talent voor zingen.
translations.hi: मेरे पास गाने की प्रतिभा नहीं है.
translations.el: Μου λείπει το ταλέντο στο τραγούδι.
translations.nb: Jeg mangler talent for å synge.
translations.sv: Jag saknar talang för att sjunga.
translations.da: Jeg mangler talent for at synge.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); used with 'de' to express lacking something.
Preposition governed by 'manquer', introducing the thing lacking.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'de' after 'manquer'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'pour', indicating purpose.
